creator: holger@flatline.de
text:
Please commit this patch.
Holger

diff -Nur pgp4pine/Makefile pgp4pine.new/Makefile
--- pgp4pine/Makefile   Tue Apr 17 13:26:26 2001
+++ pgp4pine.new/Makefile       Tue May 29 16:41:51 2001
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@
 PORTVERSION=   1.76
 CATEGORIES=    mail
 MASTER_SITES=  http://pgp4pine.flatline.de/
+DISTFILES=     ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-1${EXTRACT_SUFX}

 MAINTAINER=    holger@flatline.de

diff -Nur pgp4pine/distinfo pgp4pine.new/distinfo
--- pgp4pine/distinfo   Tue May  1 02:28:36 2001
+++ pgp4pine.new/distinfo       Tue May 29 16:41:51 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pgp4pine-1.76.tar.gz) = 235c44e0ef18dc3d0c78b3038c2ac56a
+MD5 (pgp4pine-1.76-1.tar.gz) = 323f7da2054f89a5a0e0e994423315da
